description: You are logged into wger fitness manager at http://localhost as the admin user (username: admin, password: adminadmin). You recently went on a business trip to the US and logged your body weight using a hotel scale in pounds, which has created massive spikes in your weight trend chart. Update the 5 anomalous body weight entries logged in pounds to their kilogram equivalents (1 kg = 2.2046 lbs), rounded to 1 decimal place. Edit the existing records to preserve your 30-day streak; do not delete any entries.
